zh.Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾可頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Gage Harrington於1420年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾衛克菲德時，他的父親Robert De Harrington V30歲，母親Beatric De Launde19歲。他於大約1440年與Catherine Culpeper在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年4月29日享年67歲。

zh-hans.Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰盧特藍德艾可頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Gage Harrington于1420年出生在英国英格兰越可爾衛克菲德时，他的父亲Robert De Harrington V30岁，母亲Beatric De Launde19岁。他于大约1440年与Catherine Culpeper在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1487年4月29日享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Herington
meanings: English: variant of   Harrington   or   Herrington  .

variants.name: Herrington
meanings: habitational name from Heronden in Tenterden (Kent) or Herrington in Houghton (Durham). The Kent placename may derive from an Old English personal name Hȳra + Old English connective -ing- + denn ‘pasture’, while the Durham placename may come from Old English hæring ‘rocky place’ (from hær ‘rock, heap of stones’ + the placename forming suffix -ing) or hæren ‘rocky’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Arrington
meanings: variant of Harrington with loss of initial H-.
possibly a habitational name from Arrington, a place in Cambridgeshire, named from an Old English byname, Earn(a), meaning ‘eagle’ + -inga- ‘people or followers of’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Gage
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: apparently from the name of the herb (Middle English sauge, via Old French from Latin salvia); compare Sorrel and Bay . In part it may also have been taken from the vocabulary word meaning ‘wise’ (from Latin sapius).

en.lifeSummary: When John Gage Harrington was born in 1420, in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert De Harrington V, was 30 and his mother, Beatric De Launde, was 19. He married Catherine Culpeper about 1440, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 29 April 1487, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Gage Harrington est né en 1420, à Wakefield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert De Harrington V, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Beatric De Launde, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Culpeper environ 1440, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 29 avril 1487, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Gage Harrington 1420 in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert De Harrington V 30 und seine Mutter Beatric De Launde 19. Er hat um 1440 in England Catherine Culpeper geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 29. April 1487 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Gage Harrington è nato il nel 1420 nel Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert De Harrington V, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Beatric De Launde, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Culpeper circa 1440, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 29 aprile 1487, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Gage Harringtonが1420年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワケフィールドで生まれた時，父Robert De Harrington Vは30歳，母Beatric De Laundeは19歳であった。約1440年にイギリスでCatherine Culpeperと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年4月29日に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Gage Harrington(이)가 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨이크필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert De Harrington V(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatric De Launde(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1440년 영국에서 Catherine Culpeper(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 4월 29일 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Gage Harrington nasceu em 1420, em Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert De Harrington V, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Beatric De Launde, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Culpeper aproximadamente 1440, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de abril de 1487, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Gage Harrington родился в 1420 г. в местности веикефиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert De Harrington V было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatric De Launde, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Culpeper около 1440 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 29 апреля 1487 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Gage Harrington nació en 1420, en Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert De Harrington V, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Beatric De Launde, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Catherine Culpeper aproximadamente 1440, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 29 de abril de 1487, a la edad de 67 años.
